text.title: Stakeholder Engagement Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules grounding the engagement register.

rule.statement: Every stakeholder entry MUST have a quadrant from the enum {manage_closely, keep_satisfied, keep_informed, monitor}.
rule.rationale: Quadrant drives cadence; unclassified entries cannot be scheduled.

rule.statement: Every quadrant assignment MUST cite an evidence artefact (minutes, decision log, signed off-take).
Cadence MUST follow: manage_closely=weekly, keep_satisfied=biweekly, keep_informed=biweekly, monitor=monthly. Deviations require recorded justification.
rule.rationale: Without bounded cadence, the register drifts back to ad-hoc.

rule.statement: Every entry MUST record current_engagement and desired_engagement from the enum {unaware, resistant, neutral, supportive, leading}.
rule.rationale: Without delta tracking, engagement strategies cannot be measured.

rule.statement: Stakeholders flagged overdue (`engagement-due.py` exits 1) MUST be addressed before publishing weekly status.
rule.rationale: Status without stakeholder coverage misleads sponsors.
